title: fumana thymifolia var. bracteifera
intro: Fumana thymifolia var. bracteifera, also known as the shrubby cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving gastrointestinal issues, and supporting the immune system. Fumana thymifolia var. bracteifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
